label: Settled Positions
description: Collapsible table of settled prediction market positions using DataTableWidget.

l0.notes: All 9 checks green. 0.1: WidgetErrorBoundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements=['predictions-trading']. 0.3: availableOn=['predictions']. 0.4: no any or @ts-ignore. 0.5: no lib/mocks/ imports. 0.6: synchronous mock context — no isLoading; usePredictionsData() throws on missing provider, caught by WidgetErrorBoundary. 0.7: DataTableWidget receives emptyMessage='No settled positions'; CollapsibleSection shows count badge (settledPositions.length). 0.8: no error field in context; WidgetErrorBoundary (0.1) covers throw. 0.9: no dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS — settledPositions read exclusively via usePredictionsData() hook. 1.2 PASS — context calls useGlobalScope() and getStrategyIdsForScope(). 1.3 PASS — settledPositions memo filters by scopeStrategyIds.length when a scope is selected. 1.4 PARTIAL — no clientId on PredictionPosition; client narrowing deferred to schema change. 1.5 PASS — strategy filter drives the deterministic subset in context. 1.6 PASS — empty strategyIds returns full settled dataset. 1.7 KNOWN-GAP — MOCK_POSITIONS in lib/mocks/fixtures/; future scope.

knownIssues.description: Client-level filter not wired — PredictionPosition has no clientId field; full client narrowing deferred to schema change.
Reference data (MOCK_POSITIONS) lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/ rather than lib/constants/; moving is future scope.
